title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Killer, Unknown person #14, Big Mom, Unknown person #15, Kaido as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The enemy is the world's strongest pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no such thing as being too prepared.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't get your panties twisted!! I have more important things to do!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm joining the party above where KAIDO is!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What floor are we on now!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we go up those stairs we'll be on three!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The rooftop is above the fifth floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right!! It won't be much longer kingdom!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm!? Hey! Did you guys just hear that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: didn't that came from the third floor!?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 26 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
